controls.title: Organizational mission is understood
Internal and external stakeholders are understood
Legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements are understood
Critical objectives and activities are understood
Outcomes, capabilities, and services are understood
Risk management objectives are established
Risk appetite and tolerance statements are established
Cybersecurity risk management activities are integrated
Strategic direction describes risk priorities
Lines of communication exist for cybersecurity risks
A standardized method for calculating risk is established
Strategic opportunities are characterized
Organizational leadership is responsible for cybersecurity risk
Roles and responsibilities for cybersecurity risk management
Adequate resources are allocated for cybersecurity risk management
Cybersecurity is included in HR practices
Organizational cybersecurity policy is established
Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities are coordinated
Cybersecurity risk management strategy outcomes are reviewed
Cybersecurity risk management strategy is reviewed
Organizational cybersecurity risk management performance is evaluated
Cybersecurity supply chain risk management policy is established
Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for suppliers are established
Cybersecurity supply chain risk management is integrated
Suppliers are known and prioritized by criticality
Requirements to address cybersecurity risks are established
Planning and due diligence are performed for suppliers
Risks posed by suppliers are understood and recorded
Relevant suppliers and partners are included in incident planning
Supply chain security practices are integrated
Cybersecurity supply chain risk management plans include provisions
Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained
Inventories of software managed by the organization are maintained
Representations of the organization's authorized network communication
Inventories of services provided by suppliers are maintained
Assets are prioritized based on classification, criticality
Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities for the entire workforce
Inventories of data and corresponding metadata
Systems, hardware, software are managed throughout their lifecycles
Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded
Cyber threat intelligence is received from forums and sources
Internal and external threats to the organization are identified
Potential impacts and likelihoods of threats exploiting vulnerabilities
Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to understand risk
Risk responses are chosen, prioritized, planned, tracked
Changes and exceptions are managed
Processes for receiving, analyzing, and responding to vulnerability disclosures
The authenticity and integrity of hardware and software are assessed
Critical suppliers are assessed prior to acquisition
Improvements are identified from evaluations
Improvements are identified from security tests and exercises
Improvements are identified from execution of operational processes
Incident response plans and other cybersecurity plans are established
Identities and credentials for authorized users are managed
Identities are proofed and bound to credentials based on context
Users, services, and hardware are authenticated
Identity assertions are protected, conveyed, and verified
Access permissions and authorizations are managed
Physical access to assets is managed, monitored, and enforced
Personnel are provided with awareness and training
Individuals in specialized roles are provided with awareness
The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected
The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected
The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-use are protected
Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested
Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access
The organization's technology assets are protected from environmental threats
Mechanisms are implemented to achieve resilience requirements
Adequate resource capacity is ensured to support continuity objectives
Configuration management practices are established
Software is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
Hardware is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
Log records are generated to enable monitoring
Installation and execution of unauthorized software are prevented
Secure software development practices are integrated
Potentially adverse events are analyzed to characterize the events
Information is correlated from multiple sources
The estimated impact and scope of adverse events are understood
Information on adverse events is provided to authorized staff
Cyber threat intelligence and other contextual information are integrated
Incidents are declared when adverse events meet defined criteria
Networks and network services are monitored
The physical environment is monitored
Personnel activity and technology usage are monitored
External service provider activities are monitored
Computing hardware and software are monitored
The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties
Incident reports are triaged and validated
Incidents are categorized and prioritized
Incidents are escalated or elevated as needed
The criteria for initiating incident recovery are applied
Analysis is performed to establish what has taken place during an incident
Actions performed during an investigation are recorded
Incident cause is determined
Incidents are categorized consistent with response plans
Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
Information is shared with designated internal and external stakeholders
Incidents are contained
Incidents are eradicated
The recovery portion of the incident response plan is executed
Recovery actions are selected, scoped, prioritized, and performed
The integrity of backups and other restoration assets is verified
Critical mission functions and cybersecurity risk management are considered
The integrity of restored assets is verified
The end of incident recovery is declared based on criteria
Recovery activities and progress in restoring operations are communicated
Public updates on incident recovery are shared
